text.title: Trend Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Trend Analysis methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: define-candidates
step.action: Lock the 3-5 trends to analyse this cycle.

step.name: pull-five-signals
step.action: Pull search interest, paper count, funding rounds, GitHub stars, social mentions per trend.
step.decision-gate: Reject trends with <5 signal classes available.

step.name: normalize-and-composite
step.action: Min-max normalize per signal class; weighted composite 0-100.

step.name: decay-curve-fit
step.action: Fit 4-quarter decay curve from last-quarter delta; flag hype vs structural.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Render trend-report.md with citations + retrieval dates.
